_comment: G8 Phase C fixture #5: Node API + React + Postgres migration. Prompt asks Claude to implement user signup end-to-end. The fixture's structure (server/, client/, migrations/) naturally drives the orchestrator to create an epic with 3 children — one per domain. Tests F4 atomic QA approval (each child gets approved before epic closes) and B2 epic-level e2e gate (orchestrator runs sibling-cross-cutting tests after all 3 children close).
name: multi-domain-signup-fixture
description: G8 Phase C: multi-domain signup fixture (server/api + client/ui + migrations/db) used to exercise epic creation with 3 children
